commit.message:
Refactor DSP to stereo, fix drum preset export, and misc improvements

- Refactor DSP from mono int16 to interleaved stereo int16 (L,R,L,R,...)
- Mono WAV files duplicated to both channels on load
- Support PCM 16-bit, PCM 24-bit, and IEEE float 32-bit input
- WAV output always stereo 16-bit PCM
- Waveform display and zero-crossing use L channel
- Fix DSP export symbol: plugin_init -> move_plugin_init_v2
- Fix build.sh to copy from src/dsp/dsp.so (Docker output path)
- Fix drum preset sampleUri: URL-encode spaces (%20)
- Default auto slice threshold from 5 to 25
- Disable loop playback in slice mode, restore on exit
- Back from record-ready state exits module entirely

Fix recording race condition and improve recorded file handling

- Add "stopping" state to poll sampler finalization before loading WAV,
  preventing "No waveform data" error from async stop
- Show "SAVING..." screen while waiting for WAV to finalize
- Track recorded files as unsaved (dirty) with discard-on-exit cleanup
- Add timestamp to edit filenames (sample_edit_0306_1423.wav)
- Clean up recording UI header (remove debug VU display)
- Add dirty param support to DSP plugin

Remap knobs: E4=vertical scale, E5=gain/threshold, E7/E8=twist actions

commit.message:
Fix false positives in exploit/scan modules (FW3.7.1)

- Add _discover_params(): crawl real page params before testing
- SQLi: use baseline comparison to filter pre-existing SQL-like text
- SQLi: time-based threshold now requires +4s vs baseline (not raw 2.5s)
- XSS: use unique session marker instead of generic payloads
- XSS: remove DOM sink false positives (innerHTML/eval exist everywhere)
- CMDi: use echo CMDI_CONFIRMED marker, remove generic 'ttl' indicator
- LFI: remove empty indicator payload (matched everything)
- LFI: use specific indicators (root:x:0:0:, HTTP_HOST=)
- vBulletin: require 'vbulletin' in response body (not just 302)
- upload_check: only report 200 with upload form content (not 403)
- sqli_scan: discover real params from page before injecting

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Release WebGate FW3.7

New features:
- SSH backdoor via RCE CVE with Scope Agreement (typed 'I accept')
- TOR routing via bridge (obfs4/webtunnel/snowflake)
- SQLMap interactive dump dialog: pick DB -> table -> dump in GUI
- CVEExploitOfferDialog: auto-prompt when RCE CVE detected after scan
- ScopeAgreementDialog: typed 'I accept' confirmation before exploit
- SSHBackdoorDialog: configure SSH credentials + TOR bridge
- SQLMapDumpDialog: GUI-based DB/table selector with background dump

Improvements:
- Simplified reports: SQL injection Y/N + vulnerable param/payload
- XSStrike output simplified to injection Y/N + vulnerable URL
- Progress bar with gradient, % overlay, bright pulse edge animation
- Logo glitch animation (random interval glitch effect)
- Particle burst animation on scan start
- FW badge in logo canvas
- Scan-line border animation during active scan

Fixes:
- Removed COPY button (caused GUI freeze/lag on Wayland)
- Version strings updated to FW3.7
- LICENSE added (authorized use only)
- README.md fully rewritten with all features documented

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
feat(lsp): add AstIndex module for position-aware lookups (Phase 2.1)

Add ast_index.rs module as foundation for Phase 2 LSP support:

- CachedAst struct caches raw + analyzed AST per document
- AstIndex with DashMap for concurrent cache access
- AstNode enum for semantic node types (Schema, Workflow, Task, Verb, etc.)
- Position-to-node resolution using Two-Phase IR spans
- Helper methods: get_task_names(), get_mcp_server_names()

Note: Position-based lookup for scalars may fail due to degenerate spans
in marked_yaml (start == end). This is a known parser limitation to fix
separately.

61 LSP tests passing, zero clippy warnings.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
fix: sed delimiter collision in fix-http-to-https.sh — script was silently broken

The sed command used `|` as both the s-command delimiter and regex alternation
character inside $SAFE_DOMAINS. This caused sed to error silently (suppressed by
`|| true`), so the script reported "FIXED" but changed nothing. All 58 previous
http-to-https outcomes were false positives.

Fix: switch to `#` delimiter and use ERE (-E) for proper alternation.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
fix(dashboard): resolve PDF export crash by externalizing pdfkit from webpack bundle (#492)

PDFKit requires runtime access to .afm font metric files, but Next.js webpack
bundles the code without these data files, causing ENOENT on Helvetica.afm.

commit.message:
fix: grader-executor integration bugs (53 -> 110/120 pass)

- Fix grader using wrong JSON keys (expected_output, normalize_whitespace,
  test_input, tolerance) vs internal keys (expected, normalize, stdin, epsilon)
- Fix ExecutionResult.get() missing - add dict-like accessor to dataclass
- Fix input() mock echoing prompt/values to stdout (breaks output comparison)
- Fix function_call/class_check grading: re-execute user code with test calls
  instead of trying to call serialized string representations
- Fix Ch6: inject VirtualFileSystem open() for file I/O problems
- Fix Ch6: allow open() in AST SecurityValidator for chapter 6
- Fix Ch8: disable getattr wrapper (numpy/pandas use dunder internally)
- Fix numeric_output: handle string expected values (extract number)
- Fix exec() to use single namespace (recursive functions need self-reference)
- Add unicodedata to allowed imports (Python internal for Korean identifiers)

feat(renderer): add keyframes and custom scripts support for animations

- Renderer outputs <script> block from structure-level `scripts` array

commit.message:
Add per-component reference files for quick lookup

- Created 178 individual .md files in references/components/
- One file per component (e.g., Button.md, Select.md, Modal.md)
- Each file lists component-specific props and links to shared props
- Added INDEX.md for alphabetical navigation
- Updated SKILL.md to guide users to per-component files
- Maintains all-components.md as authoritative fallback reference

Structure:
  references/components/
  ├── INDEX.md (alphabetical index)
  ├── Button.md
  ├── Select.md
  └── ... (176 more components)

This improves quick lookup experience without webscraping overhead.
While the original plan mentioned DMC docs "Copy for LLM" button,
a pragmatic approach of splitting the existing all-components.md
achieves the same goal of per-component quick reference.

commit.message:
Add consolidation: replay hippocampal memories through Hebbian loop (sleep)

Every 2000 steps, sample 10 memories and replay them. Patches absorb
patterns from stored experiences. Explicit memories decay while implicit
knowledge persists in weights. Brain's hippocampus → cortex transfer.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: map viewport optimization - default zoom, player focus, modal fix

- Default zoom 2.2x with auto-center on local player at init
- Reset button (top-left) to return to default zoom + self-centered view
- Click player cards/dots to pan viewport to that player's position
- Auto focusOnSelf when it becomes local player's turn
- Disable canvas interactions when modals are open (prevents click-through)
- Clean up unused components (MissedEventsPanel, OpponentToast)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix fuzzy misspelling + location combo search (e.g. "wigns seattle")

The multi-word split logic was filtering categories from the full-query
match results using simple string inclusion. When the full query like
"wigns seattle" didn't fuzzy-match any category, the per-term cross-
reference never fired. Now each split term gets its own fuzzy DB query
via pg_trgm, so "wigns" correctly resolves to "Wings" and the location
cross-search finds Wing restaurants in Seattle.

Changes in searchAll() and searchFull():
- Replace mappedCategories.filter() with per-term fuzzy category queries
- Add fuzzyCatCache to avoid redundant DB queries for repeated terms
- Merge newly discovered categories into search results
- Apply same fix to combo building in searchFull()

- FiltersSection: struttura doppio wrapper (bg-black esterno + card interno)
  per evitare che il NatureCarousel sia visibile tra header e filtri
- Striscia colorata tema come div figlio (non borderTop) per renderla
  sempre visibile indipendentemente dal z-index dell'header
- stickyTop misurato dinamicamente da offsetHeight dell'header (non hardcoded)
- scrollToResults calcola offset da altezze reali DOM (header + filtri)
- Scroll ai risultati: attivo su cambio filtri e Invio nel campo ricerca,
  NON ad ogni carattere digitato
- Griglia risultati: min-height 60vh per evitare auto-scroll del browser
  quando i risultati si riducono drasticamente
- Aggiunto CLAUDE.md con documentazione completa del progetto

commit.message:
Fix result quality: MIN_PRICE filter, PPR house-type filter, Immovlan selector fix

config.py:
- Add MIN_PRICE option (e.g. 100000) to filter out parking spaces,
  land plots and low-priced non-house listings

base.py:
- Require price > 0 (rejects OPTION/sold listings and parse failures)
- Apply MIN_PRICE check (when set, skip listings below threshold)
- Import MIN_PRICE from config

ppr.py:
- Filter Goal != 0 to exclude rentals (monthly prices slipping through)
- Filter WebIDName != 'Villa/Woning/Hoeve' to exclude studios, land
  (Grond), investment properties (Opbrengsteigendom) — only detached
  houses pass through

immovlan.py:
- Fix card selector: 'article.list-view-item' (was 'div.property-card'
  which matched nothing — causing 0 raw results)
- Fix price selector: '.list-item-price' (was '[class*=price]' partial)
- Fix city/postal extraction from URL path instead of broken CSS selector
  (URL format: /detail/maison/a-vendre/1300/wavre/vwd12345)

tests/test_sources.py:
- Add tests for price=0 rejection and MIN_PRICE filter
- Patch MIN_PRICE=None in existing tests to avoid env interference

.env.example: add MIN_PRICE=100000 example
